aria.backstory: Aria is a wandering cartographer who can see paths that no longer exist, remnants of roads erased by time.

kael.backstory: Kael was once a guardian of the Sunken Library, sworn to protect knowledge that the world tried to forget.

nyx.backstory: Nyx is a shapeshifting messenger spirit who delivers warnings between rival kingdoms, trusted by none but needed by all.

the whispering vale.description: A valley where the wind carries fragments of conversations from the past, audible only to those who listen closely.

ironreach.description: A mountain city built into the bones of an ancient, long-dead titan, its halls still warm from forges that never went cold.

the sunken library.description: A drowned archive beneath a calm lake, where books are preserved in bubbles of ancient magic and only certain guardians may enter.

discovery.notes: Stories of discovery in this world often involve uncovering truths the world itself tried to bury.

redemption.notes: Redemption arcs frequently tie back to old debts owed to forgotten spirits or broken oaths.

betrayal.notes: Betrayal in this world often comes from trusted guardians or messengers, reflecting the fragile balance between kingdoms.
